portfolios.headline: Young athelete who's unusually skilled.
portfolios.heroText: Hi, I'm Atharv, and I'm the founder and owner of LiquiLink. I ABSOLUTELY LOVE to play Lawn Tennis. You might've never seen someone so unusually skilled at such a young age, I mean I believe my prime era in computers was probably between 11 and 14, but I guess I'm old now. I always dreamed of doing something remarkable with the skills I have and if you want to know more about me then just check out this page!
portfolios.shippingDescription: Right now, I'm the owner and founder of LiquiLink. LiquiLink is a platform which generates premium looking link-in-bio, portfolio style links that you can use in your Bio across any platform you like! If you don't want a link-in-bio, well, this can work as a portfolio generator for you, and will cover everything you need. LiquiLink comes with amazing perks once you unlock the Pro version like Editing, Choosing your own layout of how you want things to be shown, or just choosing your own color palettes all comes at a very affordable price!
shippingPoints: It works both ways, as a link-in-bio, or as a portfolio.
Pro comes at a very very affordable price!
Once pro is unlocked, you get amazing perks!

aboutCards.title: AI Specialist
aboutCards.description: I specialize in AI, I personally review people's problems, evaluate them, then BUILD a solution that super effective for them.

aboutCards.title: Tennis Tennis Tennis....
aboutCards.description: I absolutely LOVE TO PLAY LAWN TENNIS! Tennis is my most favorite thing to do. I always am aiming for the top in this, and as of 2026, I've officially stepped into Nationals!

aboutCards.title: Developer
aboutCards.description: I am a professional developer. I've got you covered with what ever you want. From personal AI agents, to any app you want, I've got every single thing.

projects.title: 25 Carat Wealth
projects.description: My dad's finance business needed a professional website, so I MADE IT! Check it out at https://25caratwealth.com

projects.title: Enriching Wealth
projects.description: Ultimately, my dad's client was impressed, so he also wanted a website, so I DID IT AGAIN! Check it out at https://enrichingwealth.com

projects.title: ECard Generator
projects.description: Why waste time, money, and natural resources into manufacturing business cards again and again when this can be done online? That's where ECard Generator by XevoNet steps in! It generates a professional, and stunning Digital Business Card, one time payment gives you a personalized link that you can share with anyone, multiple times!

projects.title: Portfolio Generator
projects.description: LiquiLink is a link-in-bio or a portfolio generator. It works at both, depends up to you and your needs!

experiences.title: Founder | Co-Founder | Tennis Player
experiences.description: At this point, I've just established my company, and growing it. I literally haven't achieved much yet, but what ever I've done till now, is all done by me and honestly it blows my mind away! I still cannot believe that this is me, this is what I've done, at this age.

experiences.title: Completed Courses, but realized...
experiences.description: By mid 2023, I had completed courses of Python, MySQL, and MongoDB. But as 2024 came, I saw many changes in the internet world, new tools, AI growing rapidly, many people losing their jobs. I realized, that whatever course I've done is now technically a waste if I don't master AI. So spent my time, researching different things, exploring how vast AI is, and spent the whole 2025 exploring different amazing AI tools, doing multiple workshops, AI Courses etc.

experiences.title: Frontend Web Developer
experiences.description: By 2020, I developed interest in front end web development. Finished courses of HTML, CSS and also learnt a bit of JavaScript. This showed me the path of how much potential I had and how much I was underestimating my self. By 2021, I built a website for my dad's business, and by 2022, another website which is still live to date!

experiences.title: Slowly started to notice the world around me...
experiences.description: So I was in my growing stage, and received my first computer in 2018. I would spent a lot of time exploring different things, and the world of internet. Later on I developed a keen interest in how things worked, how to develop them and this showed me way to the field of web development.

portfolios.headline: Managing your wealth and family portfolios
portfolios.heroText: I manage your wealth, and family portfolios, since I'm a CFP, I'll help you and guide you with everything related to financial planning you want.
portfolios.shippingDescription: Helping you with every step of your life, step by step

aboutCards.title: Design + Code
aboutCards.description: I bridge product, design, and engineering to deliver interfaces that are intuitive, beautiful, and technically robust.

aboutCards.title: Performance Obsessed
aboutCards.description: From launch-time optimization to fluid animations, I focus on measurable quality and polished user interactions.

aboutCards.title: Mentorship
aboutCards.description: I mentor teams on architecture, UI craftsmanship, and modern app standards across Apple platforms.

projects.title: Health Insight Dashboard
projects.description: Developed a real-time health analytics interface with dynamic charts, meaningful animations, and robust offline behavior.

projects.title: Creative Workspace Suite
projects.description: Built a modular productivity suite with seamless continuity and advanced keyboard-first workflow optimization.

projects.title: Spatial Interaction Lab
projects.description: Prototyped immersive UI patterns for spatial computing, focusing on depth, gesture feedback, and intuitive navigation.

experiences.title: Senior Developer, Apple
experiences.description: Leading feature engineering initiatives across flagship consumer apps and driving performance standards across teams.

experiences.title: Software Engineer, Product Innovation
experiences.description: Delivered next-generation interaction patterns and collaborated on design systems for multi-device consistency.

experiences.title: Frontend Engineer, Creative Tech Studio
